candidates.candidate_name: Chaminade I Am A Scientist - American Samoa
candidates.venue_name: Lyndon B. Johnson Tropical Medical Center

overnight_evidence.snippet: two-week health sciences boot camp was geared toward first to eighth graders. 169 students from elementary to high school attended

recent_activity_evidence.snippet: August 26, 2024 - For the first time since its founding in 2009, Chaminade's popular I Am a Scientist summer camp traveled... to American Samoa

candidates.notes: College-run program. Appears to be a day camp (no overnight evidence). Funded by Frederic Duclos Barstow Foundation. Partnered with LBJ Tropical Medical Center, American Samoa Dept of Education, NSF ALL-SPICE.
validation_needs: confirm if program will run again in 2025/2026

overnight_evidence.snippet: Summer camp on the beautiful island of Ta'u, in the Manu'a Islands of American Samoa for its youth ages 8-18. Ocean Awareness & Agriculture are key focuses.

candidates.notes: Website appears to be non-functional (redirects to Google Drive sign-in). Cannot verify current status. Original snippet indicated overnight youth camp on Ta'u island.

candidates.candidate_name: National Park of American Samoa - Camping/Accommodation

overnight_evidence.snippet: There are no campgrounds available on the islands, so you'll have to find alternate accommodations. No, camping is prohibited in the park.

recent_activity_evidence.snippet: National Park of American Samoa info

candidates.notes: NOT A YOUTH CAMP - camping is actually prohibited in the National Park of American Samoa. This is general tourism accommodation info, not a youth program.
